payload.answer: Apply the correction: set the current preference to early Coltrane and mark the Bill Evans preference as superseded, not current.
citations: Existing current fact: Sam from Goldman likes Bill Evans.

details: Detected an explicit correction to an existing current fact.
Classified the new statement as a replacement, not an additional coexisting preference.
Prepared one current memory card and one supersession record to avoid presenting the old fact as current.

repair_options: Replace the existing current preference with the corrected preference for early Coltrane.
Mark the Bill Evans preference as superseded/retracted rather than keeping both as current.
If downstream systems require history, preserve the old fact only as a superseded record.
